query: India first hydrogen train route specifications capacity manufacturer July 2026 launch details

{"query":"India first hydrogen train route specifications capacity manufacturer July 2026 launch details","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1446,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/india-business/indias-first-hydrogen-train-set-for-july-17-launch-route-features-inside-look-and-faqs/articleshow/132431994.cms","title":"India's first hydrogen train set for July 17 launch: Route, features, inside look and FAQs - The Times of India","content":"2 days ago — India's first Hydrogen Fuel Cell Trainset is designed to generate its own electricity onboard using hydrogen instead of relying on overhead ...Read more
India's first hydrogen train set for July 17 launch: Route, features, inside look and FAQs
India is set to get its first Hydrogen Fuel Cell Train on Friday.
The train will initially operate at a maximum speed of 75 kmph on the Jind–Sonipat route.
However, it has been designed for a top speed of 110 kmph."},{"url":"https://www.indiatvnews.com/business/news/indian-railways-to-launch-country-first-hydrogen-train-on-july-17-know-route-fare-and-other-details-2026-07-07-1047369","title":"India gets its first-ever hydrogen train in major clean energy leap: Know route, fare and other details | Business - India TV News","content":"The train will run between Jind and Sonipat in Haryana and will operate using hydrogen fuel cell technology, which emits virtually zero pollution.
With this launch, July 17 is set to mark a new chapter in Indian Railways' history as the beginning of a cleaner and more sustainable era in rail transport."},{"url":"https://m.economictimes.com/news/new-updates/indias-first-hydrogen-powered-train-is-ready-pm-modi-likely-to-inaugurate-it-on-july-17-check-route-speed-features/articleshow/132267148.cms","title":"India's first hydrogen-powered train is ready: PM Modi likely to inaugurate it on July 17; Check route, speed & features - The Economic Times","content":"India is set to launch its first hydrogen-powered train from Jind, Haryana.
Narendra Modi is expected to inaugurate the landmark green initiative on July 17.
"As of now, we have received confirmation from the PMO that Prime Minister Modi will flag off the hydrogen train from Jind on July 17," a senior railway official told PTI.
Seating capacity: 682 passengers
Its design and safety systems have been independently validated by TÜV SÜD, ensuring compliance with international safety standards.
During testing, the train successfully completed trials at speeds ranging from 75 kmph to 120 kmph between Sonipat, Jind and New Delhi.
According to a Railway Board circular, the train has been authorised to operate only on the Jind–Sonipat section.
The introduction of India's first hydrogen-powered train is expected to strengthen Indian Railways' transition towards cleaner and more sustainable transport solutions.
( Originally published on Jul 08, 2026 )"},{"url":"https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/life-style/travel/news/indias-first-hydrogen-train-to-launch-on-july-17-what-every-rail-traveller-should-know-fare-schedule-and-more/articleshow/132288842.cms","title":"India's first Hydrogen Train to launch on July 17: What every rail traveller should know; fare, schedule and more | - The Times of India","content":"Prime Minister Narendra Modi flagged of the train from Jind railway station in Haryana.
The will operate on the Jind–Sonipat section under Northern Railway.The news has left rail lovers and travellers excited as this is going to be more than just another train launch.
More about the Hydrogen-powered train:A historic first for Indian RailwaysThe project was approved by the Ministry of Railways in May this year.
As per the Press Information Bureau (PIB), the Railway Board has cleared the introduction of a 10-car indigenous hydrogen fuel cell train equipped with a 1,200 kW hydrogen propulsion system.The train will run on a maximum operational speed of 75 km/hr.
It could mark the beginning of an entirely new chapter in Indian rail travel.(Sources: Press Information Bureau (PIB), Ministry of Railways, Northern Railway)","date":"14 hours ago"},{"url":"https://www.timesnownews.com/india/indias-first-hydrogen-train-to-launch-soon-check-route-speed-and-more-article-119110583","title":"India's First Hydrogen Train to Launch Soon – Check Route, Speed and More | Times Now","content":"The hydrogen train will be powered by a 1,200-horsepower (HP) hydrogen fuel engine, making it more powerful than similar trains in Germany and China, which operate at 500-600 HP.
The train will be capable of reaching speeds of 110 km/h and can accommodate over 2,500 passengers in eight coaches.
The train will operate on the Jind-Sonipat route in Haryana, covering a distance of 89 km.
Following the pilot project’s success, Indian Railways will introduce a larger programme called "Hydrogen for Heritage." This initiative will deploy 35 hydrogen trains on scenic and heritage railway routes across India."},{"url":"https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/india-business/indias-first-hydrogen-powered-train-notified-know-route-launch-date-what-makes-it-special/articleshow/132308769.cms","title":"India's first hydrogen-powered train notified: Know route ...","date":"8 days ago","content":"8 days ago — The train is expected to begin operations soon and will have a maximum operating speed of 75 kmph, powered by a 1,200 KW hydrogen fuel cell ...Read more"}]}

first hydrogen-powered train notified: Know route, launch date & what makes it special - The Times of India","content":"Indian Railways has cleared the introduction of a 10-coach Hydrogen Fuel Cell-based trainset. India’s first hydrogen train has been notified by Indian Railways. Indian Railways has cleared the introduction of a 10-coach Hydrogen Fuel Cell-based trainset for the dedicated Jind-Sonipat section under Northern Railway. The train is expected to begin operations soon and will have a maximum operating speed of 75 kmph, powered by a 1,200 KW hydrogen fuel cell propulsion system.The train has been fully designed and developed in India. Built on a Broad Gauge platform, it is currently the world's longest hydrogen-powered train with 10 coaches.The Jind-Sonipat route in Haryana has been chosen as the pilot corridor for the project. Indian Railways to launch country’s first hydrogen train on July 17: Know route, fare and other details. ## Indian Railways is set to launch the country's first hydrogen-powered train on July 17, marking a major step towards green transport. The train will run on hydrogen fuel cell technology, which produces virtually zero pollution. Prime Minister Narendra Modi will flag off India's first hydrogen-powered train on July 17, marking a major step in the country's push for clean and sustainable transport. The train will run between Jind and Sonipat in Haryana and will operate using hydrogen fuel cell technology, which emits virtually zero pollution. The launch is being seen as a significant milestone for India's Green Transport Mission as well as the Make in India initiative, showcasing the country's efforts to develop eco-friendly and indigenous rail technology. With this launch, July 17 is set to mark a new chapter in Indian Railways' history as the beginning of a cleaner and more sustainable era in rail transport.","score":0.67321366,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.timesnownews.com/india/indias-first-hydrogen-train-to-launch-soon-check-route-speed-and-more-article-119110583","title":"India's First Hydrogen Train to Launch Soon","content":"The train will operate on the Jind-Sonipat route in Haryana, covering a distance of 89 km.
